entries.quote: Every dramatic experience, every dark and cold night, every fight and every loss is overcome by reading and remembering that there is somebody waiting for you somewhere in the Big Land.

entries.quote: There are many of them, they are very diverse, and each one is wonderful in its own way. If you happen to have more postcards, we're ready to accept as many as you're able to share, as this is an ongoing need.
entries.attribution: A photo report from the front, April 2025

entries.quote: I reread them several times because I wanted to feel every word. Sometimes I just look at the postcards, and it becomes easier, because I realize we are not alone.

entries.quote: Please spread your love across all brigades … every soldier appreciates the cards and is waiting for such a postcard … a personal treasure.

entries.quote: Even on the hardest days, these postcards lift my spirits and give me strength. It feels like a little holiday in the middle of the front-line routine.
